title: Trichochloa expansa
taxonomy: Trichochloa expansa is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It is a type of grass native to Australia. This species is further classified as Trichochloa expansa within the genus Trichochloa. The classification is based on various characteristics such as its morphology and phylogenetic relationships. Trichochloa expansa is also sometimes classified under other genera, such as Elymus, but this is not universally accepted.
